message:
fix(cli): enrich NoCheckpointData with checkpoint metadata and make session show infallible

Add checkpoint_id, checkpoint_at, checkpoint_type fields to
SessionShowPaneLookup::NoCheckpointData so the JSON response
distinguishes "no checkpoint exists" from "checkpoint exists but has
no pane states." Return early with enriched metadata when pane_states
is empty. Change build_session_show_json_payload return type from
Value to Result<Value> and propagate serialization errors instead
of expect/panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
